{{Infobox group
| name = Ghost-Blades
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Ghost-Blades]] are a group of sword artists.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ghost-Blades]] are a group of three that use spectral swords.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] worked to keep the [[Ghost-Blades]] from closing in on [[Naru Saeya]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Ghost-Blades]] seek battle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“Tidewalkers and Ghost-Blades,” Naru Saeya observed,<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
